# MARCUM M a b        Q_M(a,b) = ncx2.sf(b^2, 2M, a^2)
# PFA    N gamma      P_fa      = chi2.sf(gamma, 2N)
# THR    N pfa        gamma     = chi2.ppf(1-pfa, 2N)
# PD     N gamma snr  P_d       = ncx2.sf(gamma, 2N, 2N*snr)
